beats.action: Kaelen stands at the edge of the smoking fissure, looking down at the quiet desolation of the gorge.
beats.camera: wide shot, panning slowly to reveal the smoking gorge

beats.action: Kaelen speaks to the horizon, his posture rigid and unyielding.

dialogue.text: The containment is absolute. The corrupted energy has been redirected and neutralized. The sector is secure.

beats.action: Lyra stands frozen behind Kaelen, her knuckles white around the hilt of her sheathed blade.
beats.camera: medium shot, low angle looking up at Lyra

beats.action: Lyra steps forward slightly, her voice trembling with rising horror.

expression.lyra_blade_of_conviction: grieved, eyes wide with tears and anger

dialogue.text: Secure. Is that what we call this? After what you did to Master Valerius? After what you did to everyone who stood in that valley?

beats.action: Kaelen turns slowly to face Lyra, maintaining an unbothered, clinical posture.
beats.camera: over-the-shoulder shot looking from Lyra to Kaelen

dialogue.text: Their positioning was the only viable catalyst to trigger the collapse. Had I hesitated, the corruption would have expanded exponentially. I chose the path of minimum expenditure.

beats.action: Lyra takes a slow step back, staring at Kaelen as if he were an absolute stranger.
beats.camera: medium shot, slow push-in on Lyra

beats.action: Lyra whispers, her body trembling with deep-seated revulsion.
beats.camera: tight close-up, shallow depth of field

dialogue.text: You didn't just let them die. You calculated their value as bait. You used their faith in us to line them up for the slaughter.

beats.action: Kaelen responds, his voice dropping to a chillingly calm, quiet whisper.

dialogue.text: Faith is a variable. It made their movements predictable, which allowed for precise timing. It saved your life, Lyra.

beats.action: Lyra stares at him in absolute silence, her jaw trembling as the unspoken word 'monster' hangs in the air.
beats.camera: two-shot, profile, showing the physical and emotional gap between them

beats.action: Lyra delivers her final words with cold, absolute finality.

dialogue.text: I would rather have died in that valley. At least I would have died human.

beats.action: Lyra turns her back on Kaelen and walks away into the blowing dust of the gorge.
beats.camera: wide shot, tracking Lyra walking away, leaving Kaelen small in the frame

beats.action: Kaelen stands completely alone on the edge of the smoking fissure, the silence settling over him.
beats.camera: extreme wide shot, crane up, Kaelen isolated against the massive, ruined gorge
